---
title: "test_skill_forge_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_skill_forge_empire.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.55
style_score: 3.55
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.22
---

## Intent
The `test_skill_forge_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_select_archetype, test_extract_subject, test_validate_skill_safety. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_select_archetype, test_extract_subject, test_validate_skill_safety. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.skills.skill_forge](file://src.skills.skill_forge)

### Exports
- `test_select_archetype`
- `test_extract_subject`
- `test_validate_skill_safety`
